home.title: Six Second Scribbles
home.createOrJoinHelp: 为朋友创建房间、输入代码加入，或者直接进入公开游戏。
home.editNameHelp: 更新其他玩家在房间中看到的名字。
home.createRoomHelp: 为朋友创建一个房间，等大家准备好后分享房间代码。
home.joinWithCodeHelp: 如果有人邀请了你，就输入房间代码；如果还没有代码，也可以试试公开房间。
home.step1: 每位玩家都会获得一个包含 {count} 个项目的分类来绘制
home.step2: 在 {time} 秒内尽可能多地画出来
home.step3: 猜猜你其他玩家画了什么
home.step4: 画画者和猜题者在答对时都能得分！
home.footerText: {original} 的多人网页版 · 灵感来自 {inspiration} · {source}
home.quickPlayBody: 即刻加入，与全球玩家同乐。

settings.privateRoomHelp: Private rooms won't appear in random join
settings.fallbackHelp: Used as the shared fallback when a prompt or category is not available in a player's language.
settings.title: 设置

lobby.waitingForPlayers: 等待玩家中（至少需要 2 人）
lobby.drawTogetherWhileWaiting: Draw together with other players while waiting!
lobby.leaveDialogText: 你确定要离开这个房间吗？

roomEntry.roomInProgress: 房间正在进行中。你现在可以观看，并在返回大厅后加入。
roomEntry.playersInRoom: {count} 名玩家 | 房间内有 {count} 名玩家
roomEntry.invalidCodeText: 房间代码为 6 位，使用 A–Z 和 0–9。请检查代码后再试。
roomEntry.roomNotExist: 这个房间不存在，正在带你返回大厅...
roomEntry.tryGoBack: 试着返回大厅并重新输入代码。
roomEntry.needNameText: 加入这个房间前需要玩家名字。你已保存的语言偏好会自动使用。

drawing.hint: Tap an item once you've drawn it.

guessing.noGuessesMessage: You haven't entered any guesses. Submit anyway?
guessing.hint: Type a guess and a new box appears. Up to 10.

spectator.roomBackInLobby: Room is back in the lobby
spectator.joinableAgain: The room is joinable again. Jump in for the next game whenever you are ready.
spectator.watchingLive: Watching live updates. You can join when the room returns to the lobby.
spectator.noDrawingsYet: No drawings have been published yet.
spectator.guessingInProgress: Guessing is in progress. We'll move on once the round is complete.
spectator.lobbyAgain: The room is waiting in the lobby again. Use “Join next game” to enter as a player.
spectator.betweenRounds: This room is between rounds. We'll keep you updated live.

moderation.kickPlayerNow: {name} will be removed from the room immediately.
moderation.voteKickNeedsVotes: {name} will stay in the room unless enough players vote to remove them.
moderation.youWereKicked: You have been kicked from the room

notifications.createRoomFailed: Failed to create room. Please try again.
notifications.roomDoesNotExist: That room doesn't exist. Join a different room or create a new one!
notifications.noAvailableRooms: No available rooms found. Try creating a new room!
notifications.connectFailed: Failed to connect. Please try again.
notifications.roundInProgressJoinLater: This round is already in progress. You can join next round.
notifications.roomFullWatchOnly: This room is full, but you can keep watching.
notifications.drawpadShown: Host showed the drawpad for the room
notifications.drawpadHidden: Host hid the drawpad for the room

leaveDialog.drawingMessage: Your drawing progress will be lost and the round will continue without you.
leaveDialog.guessingMessage: Your guesses will be lost and the round will continue without you.
leaveDialog.hostMessage: Host will pass to another player when you leave.

localeSelector.disabledHelp: Unavailable locales are disabled until full playable content is ready.

roomAccess.loadFailed: We couldn't load this room right now.
